# detectBehaviorDrift

> Detect changes in agent decision patterns over time

## Inputs

| Parameter | Type | Required |
|-----------|------|----------|
| agentLabel | string | yes |
| baselinePeriod | json | yes |
| currentPeriod | json | yes |

## Steps

```mermaid
graph TD
  A[baselinePatterns: call]
  A --> B[currentPatterns: call]
  B --> C[score: call]
  C --> D[result: return]
```

## Output

Type: `DriftResult`
